Title: Verify DataDisplay displays correct data to LocalUser
Test Steps:
1. LocalUser requests data from DataDisplay.
2. DataDisplay retrieves data from RealTimeDatabase.
3. DataDisplay displays the retrieved data to LocalUser.
Expected Result: DataDisplay successfully displays the correct data to LocalUser.

Title: Verify LocalUser can log in and out
Test Steps:
1. LocalUser attempts to log in using valid credentials.
2. Authentication verifies the credentials.
3. LocalUser is logged in.
4. LocalUser logs out.
Expected Result: LocalUser successfully logs in and out.

Title: Verify LocalUser cannot log in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. LocalUser attempts to log in using invalid credentials.
2. Authentication verifies the credentials.
3. LocalUser is denied login.
Expected Result: LocalUser is not logged in due to invalid credentials.

Title: Verify LocalUser can add and remove products from Cart
Test Steps:
1. LocalUser adds a product to their Cart.
2. Cart updates to include the new product.
3. LocalUser removes the product from their Cart.
4. Cart updates to exclude the product.
Expected Result: Cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.

Title: Verify LocalUser can checkout from the system
Preconditions: LocalUser has items in their Cart.
Test Steps:
1. LocalUser initiates the checkout process.
2. Checkout processes the Cart.
3. LocalUser is redirected to a confirmation page.
Expected Result: LocalUser successfully completes the checkout process.

Title: Verify Fragment can be added to FragmentDatabase
Test Steps:
1. Fragment is added to FragmentDatabase.
2. FragmentDatabase updates to include the new fragment.
Expected Result: Fragment successfully added to FragmentDatabase.

Title: Verify Fragment can be removed from FragmentDatabase
Test Steps:
1. Fragment is removed from FragmentDatabase.
2. FragmentDatabase updates to exclude the fragment.
Expected Result: Fragment successfully removed from FragmentDatabase.

Title: Verify Fragment cannot be added to non-existent FragmentDatabase
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to add Fragment to non-existent FragmentDatabase.
2. FragmentDatabase update fails.
Expected Result: Fragment addition fails due to non-existent FragmentDatabase.

Title: Verify Fragment cannot be removed from non-existent FragmentDatabase
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to remove Fragment from non-existent FragmentDatabase.
2. FragmentDatabase update fails.
Expected Result: Fragment removal fails due to non-existent FragmentDatabase.

Title: Verify RealTimeDatabase can store and retrieve data
Test Steps:
1. RealTimeDatabase stores the data.
2. RealTimeDatabase retrieves the stored data.
Expected Result: Data is successfully stored and retrieved from RealTimeDatabase.

Title: Verify RealTimeDatabase cannot store null data
Preconditions: Data to be stored is null.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to store null data in RealTimeDatabase.
2. RealTimeDatabase update fails.
Expected Result: Null data storage attempt fails.

Title: Verify Firebase can authenticate users
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to authenticate using valid credentials.
2. Firebase verifies the credentials.
3. User is authenticated.
Expected Result: User successfully authenticates.

Title: Verify Firebase cannot authenticate users with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to authenticate using invalid credentials.
2. Firebase verifies the credentials.
3. User is not authenticated.
Expected Result: User is not authenticated due to invalid credentials.

Title: Verify Authentication can handle successful login
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in using valid credentials.
2. Authentication verifies the credentials.
3. User is logged in.
Expected Result: User successfully logs in.

Title: Verify Authentication can handle failed login
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in using invalid credentials.
2. Authentication verifies the credentials.
3. User is not logged in.
Expected Result: User is not logged in due to invalid credentials.

Title: Verify Cart can add and remove products
Test Steps:
1. Add Product to Cart.
2. Cart updates to include the new product.
3. Remove Product from Cart.
4. Cart updates to exclude the product.
Expected Result: Cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.

Title: Verify Cart cannot add null product
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to add null product to Cart.
2. Cart update fails.
Expected Result: Null product addition attempt fails.

Title: Verify Cart cannot remove non-existent product
Preconditions: Product does not exist in Cart.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to remove non-existent product from Cart.
2. Cart update fails.
Expected Result: Non-existent product removal attempt fails.

Title: Verify Checkout can process a valid Cart
Test Steps:
1. Initiate Checkout process.
2. Checkout processes the Cart.
3. User is redirected to a confirmation page.
Expected Result: Checkout process is successful.

Title: Verify Checkout cannot process an empty Cart
Test Steps:
1. Initiate Checkout process.
2. Checkout processes the empty Cart.
3. User is informed that the Cart is empty.
Expected Result: Checkout process fails due to an empty Cart.
